surfaces.authority_locus: current Site or Narada proper as declared by command
surfaces.storage_substrate: filesystem plus SQLite local runtime stores
compliance: bounded JSON output available on many commands
dry-run posture exists for bootstrap, inbox publish, runtime startup
credential refs supported through capability consent registry
residual_gaps: some command families still expose Node/pnpm repair commands because this embodiment requires them
adapter protocol is documented but not yet enforced by a conformance runner

surfaces.storage_substrate: host profiles, window-manager state, Site-local projections
residual_gaps: actual adapter mutation remains owned by Windows locus

surfaces.authority_locus: local Site runtime substrate with Git-visible mutation evidence
surfaces.storage_substrate: SQLite file plus portable mutation evidence
compliance: SQLite is documented as runtime substrate, not portable authority
mutation evidence records replayable task lifecycle changes
residual_gaps: node:sqlite remains future until conformance suite exists
store adapter contract is not yet extracted into a standalone package
